query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 10 
WHERE categoryId != 10 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%balada%' OR name LIKE '%Balada%'
    OR name LIKE '%night%' OR name LIKE '%Night%'
    OR name LIKE '%lounge%' OR name LIKE '%Lounge%'
    OR name LIKE '%disco%' OR name LIKE '%Disco%'
    OR name LIKE '%boate%' OR name LIKE '%Boate%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 10 
WHERE categoryId != 10 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%balada%' OR name LIKE '%Balada%'
    OR name LIKE '%night%' OR name LIKE '%Night%'
    OR name LIKE '%lounge%' OR name LIKE '%Lounge%'
    OR name LIKE '%disco%' OR name LIKE '%Disco%'
    OR name LIKE '%boate%' OR name LIKE '%Boate%');
